scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.db:migrate:alter: wrangler d1 execute webapp-production --local --command="ALTER TABLE coach_member_status ADD COLUMN section_assigned TEXT; ALTER TABLE coach_member_status ADD COLUMN specialties TEXT; ALTER TABLE coach_member_status ADD COLUMN year_label TEXT;"
scripts.db:reset: rm -rf .wrangler/state/v3/d1 && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed
